# 7-Day West Coast Road Trip Itinerary

This itinerary is designed to highlight the diverse landscapes and urban hubs along the California coast. Your journey prioritizes **national parks** situated within driving distance of **major cities**, ensuring a balanced mix of nature and culture. Each day involves approximately three to four hours of driving to manage your schedule efficiently.

### Day 1: San Francisco & Golden Gate Park
**Location:** San Francisco, CA  
**Driving Distance:** N/A (Starting point)  
**Activity:** Explore the historic Union Square and hike at Golden Gate Park.  
**Note:** You will begin in the **major cities** of the region to familiarize yourself with local transit systems before embarking on the road trip.

### Day 2: Yosemite National Park
**Location:** Mariposa, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 220 miles (3.5 hours) from SF  
**Activity:** Take the Highway 120 to reach Yosemite Valley. Hike to Yosemite Falls and visit El Capitan.  
**Highlight:** Immerse yourself in **national parks** while traveling northward from the **major cities**.

### Day 3: Joshua Tree National Park
**Location:** Twentynine Palms, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 130 miles (2 hours) from Yosemite  
**Activity:** Explore Chisos Canyon and Night Sky Viewing in Joshua Tree Village.  
**Activity Note:** These **national parks** provide a stark contrast to the metropolitan lifestyle of the **major cities** visited earlier.

### Day 4: Los Angeles City Exploration
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 110 miles (2 hours) from Joshua Tree  
**Activity:** Tour the Hollywood Sign and browse museums in Griffith Observatory.  
**Strategy:** After reaching the desert **national parks**, you will rest in **major cities** to refuel and prepare for the final leg.

### Day 5: Death Valley National Park
**Location:** Death Valley Campground, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 200 miles (3 hours) from LA  
**Activity:** Witness the lowest elevation point in the U.S. at Badwater Basin.  
**Nature Note:** This stop reinforces the importance of protecting **national parks** alongside preserving **major cities**.

### Day 6: San Diego Bay Area
**Location:** Coronado, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 380 miles (5.5 hours) from Death Valley  
**Activity:** Visit Balboa Park and explore San Diego Beaches.  
**Planning Tip:** Consider staying near **major cities** when visiting areas adjacent to **national parks**.

### Day 7: Return to San Francisco
**Location:** San Francisco, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 360 miles (5.5 hours) from San Diego  
**Activity:** Cross the Bay Bridge, visit Pier 39.  
**Final Thoughts:** Conclude your 7-day trip by enjoying the **major cities** once more, remembering the beauty of the **national parks** you experienced throughout your travels.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
# 7-Day West Coast Road Trip Itinerary

This itinerary is designed to highlight the diverse landscapes and urban hubs along the California coast. Your journey prioritizes **national parks** situated within driving distance of **major cities**, ensuring a balanced mix of nature and culture. Each day involves approximately three to four hours of driving to manage your schedule efficiently.

### Day 1: San Francisco & Golden Gate Park
**Location:** San Francisco, CA  
**Driving Distance:** N/A (Starting point)  
**Activity:** Explore the historic Union Square and hike at Golden Gate Park.  
**Note:** You will begin in the **major cities** of the region to familiarize yourself with local transit systems before embarking on the road trip.

### Day 2: Yosemite National Park
**Location:** Mariposa, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 220 miles (3.5 hours) from SF  
**Activity:** Take the Highway 120 to reach Yosemite Valley. Hike to Yosemite Falls and visit El Capitan.  
**Highlight:** Immerse yourself in **national parks** while traveling northward from the **major cities**.

### Day 3: Joshua Tree National Park
**Location:** Twentynine Palms, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 130 miles (2 hours) from Yosemite  
**Activity:** Explore Chisos Canyon and Night Sky Viewing in Joshua Tree Village.  
**Activity Note:** These **national parks** provide a stark contrast to the metropolitan lifestyle of the **major cities** visited earlier.

### Day 4: Los Angeles City Exploration
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 110 miles (2 hours) from Joshua Tree  
**Activity:** Tour the Hollywood Sign and browse museums in Griffith Observatory.  
**Strategy:** After reaching the desert **national parks**, you will rest in **major cities** to refuel and prepare for the final leg.

### Day 5: Death Valley National Park
**Location:** Death Valley Campground, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 200 miles (3 hours) from LA  
**Activity:** Witness the lowest elevation point in the U.S. at Badwater Basin.  
**Nature Note:** This stop reinforces the importance of protecting **national parks** alongside preserving **major cities**.

### Day 6: San Diego Bay Area
**Location:** Coronado, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 380 miles (5.5 hours) from Death Valley  
**Activity:** Visit Balboa Park and explore San Diego Beaches.  
**Planning Tip:** Consider staying near **major cities** when visiting areas adjacent to **national parks**.

### Day 7: Return to San Francisco
**Location:** San Francisco, CA  
**Driving Distance:** 360 miles (5.5 hours) from San Diego  
**Activity:** Cross the Bay Bridge, visit Pier 39.  
**Final Thoughts:** Conclude your 7-day trip by enjoying the **major cities** once more, remembering the beauty of the **national parks** you experienced throughout your travels.<|im_end|>
